reviews.comment:
Linda estación, ubicada en un lugar para descanso del que viene del sur hacía el centro.

(Translated by Google)
Nice station, located in a place where those coming from the south to the center can rest.

reviews.comment:

Excellent service. Very varied and tasty fast food.

reviews.comment:
Estás cabañas se encuentran sobre la ruta, cómodas pero el equipamiento interno deberia mejorarse (utensilios, cubrecamas)

(Translated by Google)
These cabins are located on the main road, comfortable but the internal amenities could be improved (utensils, bedspreads).

reviews.comment:
No había agua en los baños ,ni para el mate,aparte tenes q pagar con tarjeta xq desp de cierta hora no aceptan efectivo

(Translated by Google)
There was no water in the bathrooms, not even for the mate, and you have to pay by card because after a certain time they don't accept cash.
